summary: Radiotherapy for prostate cancer does not appear to increase the risk of bladder cancer according to current evidence; all referenced sources describe its therapeutic application for urinary issues without indicating carcinogenesis or elevated bladder malignancy rates post-treatment. The absence of reported cases linking such treatment directly to bladder cancers supports this conclusion.
